calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EUGENE CHANG OF THE STEIN & LUBIN LLP, TEL. NO. 981-0550 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF 1355 MARKET STREET ASSOCIATES, L.P.'S Motion For Entry of Judgment pursuant to the pleadings and stipulations executed by the parties in this quiet title action filed under the McEnerney Act is granted. The Moving party provided the court at the hearing, with a valid Proof of Service that complies with CCP 1013(a) by stating personal knowledge that the documents were delivered to the Fed Ex agent and to provide a form for entry of judgment in addition to the judgment itself. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
